En: Now *this* place seems promising from an ideological angle...
Zh: 从意识形态的角度来看，*这个*地方很有潜力……

En: Where am I?
Zh: 我在哪？

En: Inhale.
Zh: 吸气。

En: An important place. One of the last bastions of the left in Martinaise. Perhaps here you'll find the man who'll help you get organised?
Zh: 这是个重要的地方。是马丁内斯保存下来最后一批堡垒。或许在这儿可以发现帮你找到组织的人？

En: We're getting crates and pallets calling to mind vast stands of winter pines, a swirl of ancient odours absorbed by heavy carpet fibres, but also a pervasive, treacly *sweetness* that somehow reminds you of kola nuts...
Zh: 那些箱子和货板让人联想到冬日里的大片松树，厚重的地毯吸收了空气中古旧的气息。不过，也有一股四处弥漫的甜蜜*芬芳*，不禁让你联想到可乐果……

En: ... an office? Something officious? Is that a word? There's a bit of dust in the air that may be triggering your allergies.
Zh: ……这是一间办公室吗？还是什么办公所？有这个词吗？空气中的尘埃可能会导致你过敏……

En: Meanwhile, Evrart Claire clatters away on his typewriter, wilfully indifferent to your presence.
Zh: 与此同时，艾弗拉特·克莱尔在他的打字机前拼命打着字，故意无视你的存在……

En: But you can't just come out and *ask* him. You should make your introduction first. Pay homage. This is a man of *stature*.
Zh: 但你也不能就这么直接*问*他。你应该先自我介绍一下，以表尊敬。这个人很有*名望*。

En: Meanwhile, the man of stature clatters away on his typewriter, wilfully indifferent to your presence.
Zh: 与此同时，那个很有名望的男人在他的打字机前拼命打着字，故意无视你的存在……

En: Yes, *of course*. Now we're on the right track...
Zh: 是的，*当然了*。我们做得对……

En: It smells like...
Zh: 这闻起来像是……

En: The lieutenant gives you a sharp sideways look.
Zh: 警督用尖锐的余光打量着你。

En: Well? Smelling much *communism* around the Union boss's office?
Zh: “哦？在工会老大的办公室里*康米主义*味道很浓烈吗？”

En: Hush, Kim, I'm detecting.
Zh: “嘘，金，我正在调查呢。”

En: Hmmm.
Meanwhile, the man behind the desk clatters away on his typewriter, wilfully indifferent to your presence.
Zh: 与此同时，桌子后面的那个男人在他的打字机前拼命打着字，故意无视你的存在……

En: The whole place could probably use a good deep cleaning, you think.
Zh: 你觉得这个地方真应该好好打扫一下了。

En: Is that an Insulindian phasmid? It looks like an Insulindian phasmid. Quick -- catch it before it scuttles away!
Zh: 那个是伊苏林迪竹节虫吗？看起来应该就是。快点——赶快抓住它，别让它跑了！

En: Pirouette toward the phasmid.
Zh: 踮着脚走向竹节虫。

En: Creep up to the phasmid quietly.
Zh: 悄悄爬向竹节虫。

En: Wait a moment. Is that really the phasmid? You don't want to make a fool out of yourself.
Zh: 等一下。那真的是竹节虫吗？你可不想让自己出洋相。

En: Beautiful leap! But this isn't a phasmid in your hand -- it is a fishing rod.
Zh: 漂亮！但握在你手里的不是竹节虫——而是一根钓鱼竿。

En: His great belly ripples with laughter. "A skinny, shy young girl? Never mind."
Zh: 他的大肚皮随着笑声起起伏伏。“一个瘦削害羞的年轻姑娘吗？没关系的。”

En: You're a master of stealth. But look what you've caught -- not a phasmid, but a fishing rod!
Zh: 你真是潜行大师。但是看看你抓到了什么——不是什么竹节虫，而是一根钓鱼竿！

En: Perhaps we should try it out in the wild sometime.
Zh: “也许我们应该找个时间去外面试试。”

En: Definitely not a phasmid. Definitely a fishing rod.
Zh: 肯定不是竹节虫。绝对是钓鱼竿。

En: I doubt you'll learn anything from that fishing rod.
Zh: “我觉得你从那根钓鱼竿也看不出什么来吧。”

En: What are you trying to accomplish, Harry?
Zh: “你这是想干什么，哈里？”

En: Fisherman? Totally. It's all I do for fun.
Zh: “钓鱼爱好者？那还用说。那可是我平时唯一的乐趣了。”

En: Uh, it's a novel fishing method.
Zh: “呃，这是一种比较新奇的钓鱼方法。”

En: Ha ha, maybe you were.
Zh: “哈哈，也许是吧。”

En: Sorry, I thought the fishing rod was... something else.
Zh: “抱歉，我把钓鱼竿当成了……别的东西。”

En: Well, you certainly succeeded, Harry. He adjust himself in the chair. "You are a very surprising police officer indeed."
Zh: “好吧，你的确成功了，哈里。”他坐在椅子里，稍微调整了一下姿势。“你确实是个很让人惊喜的警官。”

En: I was just trying to surprise you. To throw you off, you know.
Zh: “我是想给你个惊喜。迷惑你，你懂得。”

En: You shout at what you thought to be a phasmid, but turns out to be a fishing rod.
Zh: 你朝着你眼中的竹节虫大声呵斥，没想到它不过是根钓鱼竿。

En: I thought so, Harry, I thought so. We should go out together sometime. Bond like men of worth and value.
Zh: “我猜也是，哈里，我就知道。我俩应该找个时间一起出去。像有价值的男人一样，团结一心。”

En: Nah, I'm just sizing you up. Studying your strengths and weaknesses.
Zh: “没，我不过是想试试你。研究下你的优点，还有弱点。”

En: It's gotta be the phasmid this time. Look -- it moved!
Zh: 这次肯定是竹节虫。你看——它动了！

En: I see you're admiring my fishing gear. Are you by any chance a fisherman yourself?
Zh: “我看你好像挺喜欢我的钓鱼装备。你不会刚好也是个钓鱼爱好者吧？”

En: I think maybe I used to be the Fisher King...
Zh: “我觉得我曾经还可能是钓鱼之王呢……”

En: Stop right there!
Zh: “站住！”
